news.title: Beyond Meat reports wider-than-expected Q1 loss, cuts full-year revenue guidance by 20%
Beyond Meat CFO resigns effective immediately; company launches 'strategic alternatives' review
Beyond Meat draws down remaining $50M revolving credit line amid cash burn concerns
